SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-28-2010 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-28-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-28-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 1979 UNION STREET CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEREMIA, LAUREN DBA LAUREN GEREMIA DESIGNS $1,783.62 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,888.62, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES OWING TO PLAINTIFF AFTER DUE CREDIT FOR DEFENDANT'S PREVIOUS PAYMENT. THE JUDGMENT IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO ANY CLAIM EITHER PARTY MAY HAVE AGAINST THE FLOORING MANUFACTOR OR DISTRIBUTOR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
